name: Rebound
desc: When your opponent activates a Spell Card, Trap Card, or monster effect that returns a card(s) from the field to the hand: Negate that effect, and if you do, send 1 card from your opponent's hand (at random) or from their side of the field to the Graveyard. When this Set card is destroyed by your opponent's card effect and sent to the Graveyard: Draw 1 card.
eff: When your opponent activates a Spell Card, Trap Card, or monster effect that returns a card(s) from the field to the hand: Negate that effect, and if you do, send 1 card from your opponent's hand (at random) or from their side of the field to the Graveyard. When this Set card is destroyed by your opponent's card effect and sent to the Graveyard: Draw 1 card.

action: Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
